---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for AXIOM
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🤔 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Case
Who would use this feature and why?

## 🎯 Impact
How would this benefit AXIOM users?

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I've searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with AXIOM's vision
- [ ] I can explain the use case clearly
